title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
